title: taraxacum tephroleucum
intro: Taraxacum tephroleucum, also known as the white-leafed dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases, including heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum tephroleucum, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent, and are used to support digestive health and relieve stress.
